extraction.one_line_summary: ALAPHILIPPE Julian attacked with 2km to go on Monte Sante Marie, dropped FUGLSANG Jakob in final 300m after FUGLSANG's own acceleration failed.
tactical_patterns: VAN AERT bridged solo from peloton at 36km to go but emptied himself, instantly dropped when leaders attacked Monte Sante Marie.
FUGLSANG accelerated first on Monte Sante Marie but ALAPHILIPPE tracked breathing-through-nose, then destroyed him with 300m counter on technical finish.
ROSA Diego's early Sky move dangerous enough to force full peloton chase, suggesting even weak solo breaks threaten on this course.

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: Bridge from peloton to leaders at 36km showed raw power but tactical naivety, left nothing for decisive climb
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: negative: Initiated winning move on Monte Sante Marie but lacked final acceleration, second place despite perfect positioning
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: Tracked FUGLSANG's acceleration while breathing through nose, then had reserves for devastating 300m counter
rider_signals.BENOOT Tiesj: neutral: Podium repeat at Monte Sante Marie suggests QuickStep can place multiple riders if they ride less aggressively
